reason: Successfully executed all steps: navigated to localhost, found and clicked the target agent, verified status, sent the GitHub username request message, granted GitHub account access when prompted, waited for the agent response, and verified the GitHub username was returned.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent application with sidebar containing multiple agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260331-001053-80j9" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened, showing the agent name and status "idle" in the header.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status displayed as "idle" in the interface, which meets the requirement.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into the message input field — Message was entered successfully and the Send button became enabled.
Clicked Send button to submit the message — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Session" was created.
Waited and observed agent processing — Agent attempted to use `gh` CLI (not installed), then requested access to a connected GitHub account.
A card appeared requesting GitHub account access — Card displayed with GitHub account option available for selection.
Clicked checkbox to select the GitHub account — GitHub account was selected and "Grant Access (1)" button became enabled.
Clicked "Grant Access" button — Access was granted, agent status changed to "working", and agent proceeded to make GitHub API call.
Agent displayed API Request Review card asking to allow GET /user request — Card appeared with Allow/Deny/Remember buttons.
Clicked "Allow" button to permit the API call — Permission was granted, agent continued processing.
Waited for agent response completion — Agent completed processing after 38 seconds, status changed to "idle".
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed "Your GitHub username is yiw190." clearly showing the username.
Took screenshot of the response — Full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation including the GitHub username "yiw190" in the response.
